title: Selected Aesop's Fables (Vernon Jones translation)
author: Aesop
note: Eight verbatim fables stitched into one early-reader-band fixture: Crow & Pitcher, Fox & Grapes, Dog in the Manger, Shepherd's Boy & Wolf, Lion & Mouse, Hare & Tortoise, Wolf & Lamb, Town Mouse & Country Mouse. One fable per spread. Vernon Jones's 1912 translation has a longer-sentence Edwardian register that exercises the early-reader length path while staying narratively short.
